svg.title: Qwen3 Throughput vs Experiment Number
svg.desc: Scatter plot of TorchTitan tokens per second across Qwen3 autoresearch experiments, with dots colored by inferred experiment category and a dotted best-so-far line.
svg.text: Dots are individual runs colored by inferred category; dotted blue line is best-so-far screen excluding diagnostic profile rows.
Categories are inferred from each run note/command; mixed experiments are assigned to their dominant tested idea.
